calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Off Calendar

Request For A Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Quieting Title for Real Property Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Crozier #4761

Clinton Killian, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Albert Ventroy.
Plaintiff's Witness Deborah Nettles was placed under oath and testified.

No appearance by defaulted defendants Queen Ester Williams, Betty Jones, Zora Hicks and Marie Broussard.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants quieting title for real property located at 210 Lobos Street, San Francisco, CA.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court (see scanned doc for details of the judgment).

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Continued To Nov-28-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Continued To Oct-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
